metric_categories.label: Model Execution
metric_categories.description: High-level model throughput and latency metrics

metric_categories.label: GPU Efficiency
metric_categories.description: GPU utilization, SM coverage, kernel mix, and load balance

metric_categories.label: Communication
metric_categories.description: Collective communication performance, overlap, and bandwidth

avg_step_time.label: Step Time (s)
avg_step_time.description: Average per-engine-iteration wall time. For inference, most iterations are decode steps so this is dominated by decode latency. For training, measures the full forward + backward pass. Serving traces (TPOT/TTFT) are reported separately.

mfu.label: MFU (%)
mfu.description: Model FLOPs Utilization — percentage of peak hardware FLOPs utilized during active compute windows

mean_sm_coverage.label: SM Coverage (%)
mean_sm_coverage.description: Average Streaming Multiprocessor coverage across all kernels

dominant_kernel_concentration.label: Top Kernel (%)
dominant_kernel_concentration.description: Percentage of total GPU/TPU time spent in the single most time-consuming kernel (GPU) or HLO category (TPU)

moe_fraction.label: MoE Fraction (%)
moe_fraction.description: Percentage of GPU time in Mixture of Experts kernels (expert compute, routing, gating, pplx dispatch/combine)

average_memory_bandwidth.label: Avg Mem BW (GB/s)
average_memory_bandwidth.description: Average memory copy bandwidth. GPU: total bytes / total memcpy duration from CUPTI or Kineto. TPU: total bytes / elapsed time between XLA copy-start and copy-done events (conservative lower bound, includes scheduling overhead)

memory_transfer_overhead.label: Mem Transfer OH (%)
memory_transfer_overhead.description: Percentage of trace time spent on memory transfers (memcpy for NSYS, copy-like kernels for Kineto JSON)

communication_fraction.label: Comm Fraction (%)
communication_fraction.description: Percentage of GPU/TPU time in communication kernels (NCCL, cross-device, P2P, XLA collectives)

total_communication_time.label: Comm Time (s)
total_communication_time.description: Total exposed time in communication kernels (NCCL, cross-device, XLA collectives). We don't double-count overlapped portion.

bandwidth_utilization_allgather_group_6.label: AllGather BW (GB/s)
bandwidth_utilization_allgather_group_6.description: Median effective bandwidth utilization for AllGather operations

bandwidth_utilization_allreduce_group_6.label: AllReduce BW (GB/s)
bandwidth_utilization_allreduce_group_6.description: Median effective bandwidth for AllReduce operations

bandwidth_utilization_alltoall_group_6.label: AllToAll BW (%)
bandwidth_utilization_alltoall_group_6.description: Average NVLink TX throughput utilization during AllToAll operations

bandwidth_utilization_peertopeer_group_6.label: P2P BW (%)
bandwidth_utilization_peertopeer_group_6.description: Average NVLink/PCIe TX throughput utilization during peer-to-peer (pipeline parallelism) operations

metadata.description: Large language model inference on Google Cloud TPU v6e hardware using vLLM with TorchXLA/JAX backend. This workload is for meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B with TP=1. Experiments measure TTFT (Time-to-First-Token), TPOT (Time-per-Output-Token), communication overhead,  MFU (Model FLOPs Utilization), and aggregate memory bandwidth. Batch sizes range from 1 to 128 requests with fixed input sequence length of 1024 tokens.

Large language model inference on Google Cloud TPU v6e hardware using vLLM with TorchXLA/JAX backend. This workload is for meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B with TP=2. Experiments measure TTFT (Time-to-First-Token), TPOT (Time-per-Output-Token), communication overhead,  MFU (Model FLOPs Utilization), and aggregate memory bandwidth. Batch sizes range from 1 to 128 requests with fixed input sequence length of 1024 tokens.

Llama-3.1-8B training on 8 NVIDIA A100 GPUs across 2 nodes.  Configured with 4-way Data Parallelism and 2-way Tensor Parallelism  using Megatron-LM (mcore). Profiled at iteration 25 with JIT/Compile disabled.

Llama-3.1-8B training on 8 NVIDIA A100 GPUs across 2 nodes on Perlmutter.  Configured with 4-way Tensor Parallelism (TP=4) and 2-way Data Parallelism (DP=2) using Megatron-LM (mcore). Uses a global batch size of 32 and sequence length of 1024.

Llama-3.1-8B inference, TP=4, batch size 8. Global batch size is 8 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128.

Llama-3.1-8B inference, TP=4, batch size 128. Global batch size is 128 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128.

DeepSeek-MoE-16B inference, TP=4, EP=4, batch size 8. Global batch size is 8 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128.

DeepSeek-MoE-16B inference, TP=4, EP=4, batch size 128. Global batch size is 128 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128.

Llama-3.1-8B inference, TP=4, batch size 8, communication=NCCL+MSCCL++. Global batch size is 8 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. MSCCL++ was enabled through LD_PRELOAD; NCCL remains the base communication stack for collectives not intercepted by MSCCL++.

MSCCL++ was enabled through LD_PRELOAD; NCCL remains the base communication stack for collectives not intercepted by MSCCL++.

DeepSeek-MoE-16B inference, TP=4, EP=4, batch size 8, communication=NCCL+MSCCL++. Global batch size is 8 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. MSCCL++ was enabled through LD_PRELOAD; NCCL remains the base communication stack for collectives not intercepted by MSCCL++.

DeepSeek-MoE-16B inference, TP=4, EP=4, batch size 128, communication=NCCL+MSCCL++. Global batch size is 128 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. MSCCL++ was enabled through LD_PRELOAD; NCCL remains the base communication stack for collectives not intercepted by MSCCL++.

Qwen3-4B inference, TP=2, batch size 128, pure MSCCL++. Global batch size is 128 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. Pure MSCCL++ via LD_PRELOAD and VLLM_NCCL_SO_PATH with --disable-custom-all-reduce and MSCCLPP_NCCL_LIB_PATH unset, so AllReduce and AllGather both run through MSCCL++ native kernels (fullmesh / packet) rather than vLLM's custom_all_reduce or the NCCL fallback.

Qwen3-4B inference, TP=4, batch size 128, pure MSCCL++. Global batch size is 128 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. Pure MSCCL++ via LD_PRELOAD and VLLM_NCCL_SO_PATH with --disable-custom-all-reduce and MSCCLPP_NCCL_LIB_PATH unset, so AllReduce and AllGather both run through MSCCL++ native kernels (fullmesh / packet) rather than vLLM's custom_all_reduce or the NCCL fallback.

Llama-3.1-8B inference, TP=4, batch size 128, pure MSCCL++. Global batch size is 128 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. Pure MSCCL++ via LD_PRELOAD and VLLM_NCCL_SO_PATH with --disable-custom-all-reduce and MSCCLPP_NCCL_LIB_PATH unset, so AllReduce and AllGather both run through MSCCL++ native kernels (fullmesh / packet) rather than vLLM's custom_all_reduce or the NCCL fallback.

DeepSeek-MoE-16B inference, TP=4, EP=4, batch size 128, pure MSCCL++. Global batch size is 128 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 1024 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. Pure MSCCL++ via LD_PRELOAD and VLLM_NCCL_SO_PATH with --disable-custom-all-reduce and MSCCLPP_NCCL_LIB_PATH unset, so AllReduce and AllGather both run through MSCCL++ native kernels (fullmesh / packet) rather than vLLM's custom_all_reduce or the NCCL fallback.

Qwen3-4B inference, TP=4, batch size 64, input length 4096, NCCL. Global batch size is 64 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 4096 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. This is the larger-sequence follow-up collected after the batch-128 short-sequence rows.

Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. DeepSeek-MoE-16B inference, TP=4, EP=4, batch size 32, input length 3968, communication=NCCL. Global batch size is 32 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 3968 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. DeepSeek-MoE max_position_embeddings is 4096, so this uses input3968 + output128 rather than input4096 + output128.

DeepSeek-MoE-16B inference, TP=4, EP=4, batch size 32, input length 3968, communication=MSCCL++. Global batch size is 32 requests. Traces were collected on Perlmutter A100 with vLLM bench latency, PyTorch Kineto profiler, and Nsight Systems. Input length is 3968 and output length is 128; seq_len records input plus output tokens for MFU accounting. DeepSeek-MoE max_position_embeddings is 4096, so this uses input3968 + output128 rather than input4096 + output128.
